violations.text: Per interview of staff, utensils are only washed and rinsed. Ware-washing procedures reviewed. 3-bay poster left with person in charge. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

Chocolate items in the food establishment are lacking labels with a list of ingredients. Food must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Ingredient information is needed by consumers who have allergies to certain food or ingredients. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
